title: Vedantu is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Vedantu is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Vedantu in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!
